subject: Change sameGroup and consolidationRequired defaults to false
body:
Not all inter-company transactions occur between entities in a
consolidated group. Users should explicitly opt-in to consolidation
rather than having it assumed.

- relatedParties remains true (inter-company = related parties)
- sameGroup now defaults to false
- consolidationRequired now defaults to false
- Update documentation to explain when to enable these settings
title: Change sameGroup and consolidationRequired defaults to false
